clustered_themes: Termination risk can be managed as a failure-budget problem across legal, process, and settlement dimensions.
Foreign employers often overspend risk budget on speed and underspend on evidence quality.
Settlement certainty and IIT transparency are recurring underfunded controls.
Local variance should be treated as contingency in risk budgets.
dedup_notes: Rotated from hypothesis notebook to failure-budget allocation framing.
uncertainties: English legal texts may miss Chinese nuance.
